name: @rhedbull/pi-permissions
description_en: Claude Code-style permission modes for pi. Controls approval for file writes, edits, and bash commands with four modes: default, acceptEdits, fullAuto, and bypassPermissions.
description_zh: 面向 pi 的 Claude Code 风格权限模式。控制文件写入、编辑和 bash 命令的批准，具有四种模式：default、acceptEdits、fullAuto 和 bypassPermissions
